seo.title: Emeric Guyon — Freelance Fullstack Developer
seo.description: Emeric Guyon — Freelance fullstack developer, product-minded. 10+ years shipping web apps and SaaS platforms for startups and tech teams. Vue.js, Nuxt, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js. Based in Chambéry, available in Lyon, Grenoble, Annecy and Paris.

hero.name: EMERIC GUYON
hero.baseline: Senior fullstack developer — I help startups and tech teams build the right thing, and build it right.
hero.location: Based in France — fully remote or on-site depending on the project. Lyon, Grenoble, Annecy, Paris...

about.title: Product-minded developer. I don't just write code — I help you ship the right thing.
about.p1: Freelance fullstack developer with 10+ years of experience. I've worked with startups, scale-ups and large organizations — from MVP to production, from a single feature to a full platform.
about.p2: I think product before component. I challenge specs, question priorities, and chase ROI. When I join a team, I understand the "why" before I code the "how". That's how I avoid building the wrong thing.
about.p3: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt, TypeScript, Node.js, Symfony — and custom WordPress when it's the right fit. AI is part of my daily workflow: it speeds up delivery, I ensure quality.
about.label: About me

exp4.clients: My Evian, Chocolat De Neuville, Mieux Voir, Bragard

services.label: Services
services.title: What I can do for you.

custom.title: Build something new
custom.desc: Web apps, SaaS platforms, business tools — from technical scoping to deployment. I build products designed to last, not just to ship.

redesign.title: Fix or modernize what you have
redesign.desc: Stack modernization, framework migration, legacy refactoring — I take over existing code and evolve it without breaking things.

performance.title: Make it faster and more visible
performance.desc: Audit, Core Web Vitals optimization, SSR, lazy loading — measurable gains in speed and search rankings.

consulting.title: Get the architecture right
consulting.desc: Stack selection, technical architecture, code review — I step in upstream to lay the right foundations before a line of code is written.

ai.title: Add AI where it actually helps
ai.desc: AI API integration (OpenAI, Claude, etc.), automated workflows, smart features — AI serving your product, not the other way around.

team.title: Reinforce your team
team.desc: I embed in your sprints, your processes, your tools. Solo or paired, I adapt to your pace and your standards. Operational from day one.

skills.label: Stack
skills.title: The right tools for every project, tailored to your technical needs.

projects.label: Work
projects.title: Every project taught me something. Here are a few.

evianchezvous.description: Magento 2 e-commerce for home water delivery in Paris and Île-de-France.
evianchezvous.longDescription: Magento 2 e-commerce platform for Evian home water delivery — one-time orders or recurring subscriptions across Paris and Île-de-France. React.js front-end with GraphQL for a fast, seamless experience.

ekkinox.description: Custom business app for construction project financial tracking.
ekkinox.longDescription: Tailor-made business application for construction site financial monitoring. Full management interface for budget tracking and real-time reporting.

25lieuxinnovation.description: Showcase website for the 25 places changing innovation in France.
25lieuxinnovation.longDescription: Custom WordPress site with polished GSAP animations highlighting the 25 places transforming innovation in France. Tailor-made back-office with ACF and Timber.

lonn.description: SaaS marketplace for wellness centers and independent practitioners.
lonn.longDescription: MVP of a marketplace for wellness centers and independent practitioners. SaaS platform for matchmaking, booking and activity management.

elitetrackr.longDescription: Athletics statistics and rankings platform covering a large number of athletes and performances across many countries. Aggregated data, dynamic rankings and detailed athlete profiles.

juriscan.description: MVP for document text extraction for judicial officers.
juriscan.longDescription: MVP enabling automatic text extraction from legal documents, built for judicial officers. UI/UX design and development. Upload, parsing and structured output of extracted data.

parentsdouceur.description: Custom WordPress site for perinatal and parental support.
parentsdouceur.longDescription: Custom WordPress site dedicated to perinatal and parental support. UI/UX design and development. Tailor-made back-office with ACF and Timber, GSAP animations for a smooth and warm browsing experience.

inria.description: Memory profiling tool to track malloc allocations.
inria.longDescription: Full rewrite of MALT, a memory profiling tool developed by INRIA to track malloc allocations. Migration from Angular to Vue.js, featuring extensive D3.js data visualizations.
inria.takeaway1: Full rewrite of the Angular interface to Vue.js + TypeScript
inria.takeaway2: Rebuilt the source code visualizer from scratch: file navigation, line-level display and per-function metadata — feature parity with the original, modern stack
inria.takeaway3: D3.js visualizations for memory allocation analysis (malloc tracking)

uplexa.description: Landing site for a privacy-focused crypto project leveraging IoT mining.
uplexa.longDescription: Landing site for uPlexa, a privacy-focused cryptocurrency harnessing IoT device computing power for mining and anonymous payments.

contact.label: Contact me
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project — I'll be straight with you about whether I can help.

footer.source: Open source — fork, explore, get inspired.
